notes:
Authentication Stability Update

  • No more login flashes: Fixed a case where the login screen could briefly appear during startup or while entering/leaving calls.
  • Smoother session handling: Sign-in state now remains stable through transient sync events between app windows.
  • Reliable sign-out: Manual logout now transitions immediately and predictably.
  • Google sign-in hardening: Improved error handling and retry behavior for desktop Google authentication.
